📌 Note Regarding the Editions (Regular vs. Deluxe)

【Regular Edition】

Standard card specification.


【Deluxe Edition】

Special edition featuring a premium foil-stamped holo finish with a beautiful, sparkling gloss.

 

*Please note that the card's gameplay performance (stats, power, and effects) is exactly the same for both versions. The only difference is the visual surface finish.
